creator: pilot513@gmail.com
text:
I'm update system form 14.0-RELEASE to last 4.1-RELEASE-p5 FreeBSD 14.1-RELEASE-p5 GENERIC amd64 (via freebsd-update)

After that,  pkg upgrade

When I try run VM in GUI, I get error ""Kernel driver not installed (rc=-1908)" on a message window and the virtual machine doesn't start"

In dmesg messages I saw as well:
KLD vboxdrv.ko: depends on kernel - not available or version mismatch

I reinstalled virtualbox-ose and virtualbox-ose-kmod again:
pkg install -f virtualbox-ose and virtualbox-ose-kmod

but get tis error again:
Oct  6 19:30:15 farm kernel: KLD vboxdrv.ko: depends on kernel - not available or version mismatch
Oct  6 19:37:31 farm kernel: KLD vboxdrv.ko: depends on kernel - not available or version mismatch
Oct  6 19:57:56 farm kernel: KLD vboxdrv.ko: depends on kernel - not available or version mismatch
